title: Expose outreach_status, the follow-ups list, and the cadence setting over the API
userStory: As the web client, I want endpoints to read/write outreach_status, fetch the due-follow-up list, and read/update the cadence interval, so the UI can drive the feature.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /api/postings/{id} accepts an `outreachStatus` field in the PostingTracking payload and persists it; an invalid value returns HTTP 400 (not 500, not silently ignored).
The posting JSON returned by existing read endpoints (the jobs list and the single posting) includes outreach_status.
GET /api/follow-ups returns the ListFollowUpsDue() result as JSON (array of due postings with days-overdue and the fields the view needs); empty list returns an empty array, not null/404.
GET /api/settings/follow-up-interval (or the agreed settings route) returns the current interval; PUT updates it; a non-positive or non-integer value returns HTTP 400.
Round-trip test/manual check: PUT outreach_status='awaiting' then GET the posting shows 'awaiting'; PUT='replied' then GET /api/follow-ups no longer lists it.
Handlers live alongside the existing posting/outreach handlers (internal/web/capture.go, internal/web/outreach.go) and follow their error-handling conventions.
